globs:

# TypeScript Testing Standards

## Framework
- Vitest for unit tests
- c8 / @vitest/coverage-v8 for coverage
- Coverage threshold: >= 80% (branches, functions, lines, statements)

## Test Structure
- Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
- One assertion concept per test
- Use `describe` blocks to group related tests
- Use `beforeEach`/`afterEach` for setup and cleanup

## Naming
- Test files: `<module>.test.ts`
- Test names: describe what happens, not implementation details
- Example: `"returns null when file does not exist"` not `"tests loadFile"`

## Mocking
- Use `vi.mock()` at module level for ESM modules
- Use `vi.spyOn()` for instance methods
- Clean up with `vi.clearAllMocks()` in `beforeEach`
- Prefer real implementations over mocks when feasible

## Coverage Discipline
- Write tests for ALL happy paths AND ALL failure paths
- Validate with mutation testing (Stryker) — mutation score >= 80%
- Use temp directories for file system tests (`makeTempDir()` pattern)
